app_store.name: Alien Metronome
app_store.subtitle: Pro metronome with effects
app_store.description:
A beautifully designed metronome app built for serious musicians. Features delay, reverb, ring modulation, and saturation effects — all routed through a professional-grade audio engine.

KEY FEATURES:
• Precise tempo control (20-240 BPM) with tap tempo
• Multiple time signatures (1/4 through 20/4, 6/8, 7/8, 15/8, 23/8, 15/16)
• 9 unique sound options including alien-themed sounds
• Studio-quality effects: Delay, Reverb, Ring Modulation, Saturation
• Feedback control with automatic 3-second fade on stop
• Beat indicators for visual timekeeping
• Preset tempos (Largo to Prestissimo)
• Clean, distraction-free dark interface
• Works offline — no internet required
• No ads, no subscriptions, no tracking

PERFECT FOR:
• Music practice and lessons
• Live performance preparation
• Recording studio reference
• Music education
• Drummers, guitarists, pianists, and all instrumentalists

Built with Web Audio API for sample-accurate timing and professional sound quality.
app_store.app_review_notes: No account required. No data collected. All audio processing happens locally on device. The app uses Web Audio API for professional-grade timing accuracy.
app_store.export_compliance: No encryption — does not require documentation

play_store.title: Alien Metronome
play_store.short_description: Pro metronome with delay, reverb & effects. Precise timing for musicians.
play_store.full_description:
A beautifully designed metronome app built for serious musicians. Features delay, reverb, ring modulation, and saturation effects — all routed through a professional-grade audio engine.

KEY FEATURES:
• Precise tempo control (20-240 BPM) with tap tempo
• Multiple time signatures (1/4 through 20/4, 6/8, 7/8, 15/8, 23/8, 15/16)
• 9 unique sound options including alien-themed sounds
• Studio-quality effects: Delay, Reverb, Ring Modulation, Saturation
• Feedback control with automatic 3-second fade on stop
• Beat indicators for visual timekeeping
• Preset tempos (Largo to Prestissimo)
• Clean, distraction-free dark interface
• Works offline — no internet required
• No ads, no subscriptions, no tracking

PERFECT FOR:
• Music practice and lessons
• Live performance preparation
• Recording studio reference
• Music education
• Drummers, guitarists, pianists, and all instrumentalists

Built with Web Audio API for sample-accurate timing and professional sound quality. All processing happens locally on your device — no data is collected or transmitted.
play_store.data_safety: No data collected. No data shared. No data processed externally.
